The Perron–Frobenius theorem guarantees that a matrix with all strictly positive real entries has:
choices: a unique real eigenvalue of largest modulus with a componentwise-positive eigenvector

questions.q: If the ordinary generating function of a sequence {a_n}_{n≥0} is 1/(1−x)², then a_n equals:
The Lorenz system of differential equations became famous for demonstrating:
choices: chaos and sensitive dependence on initial conditions

questions.q: In special relativity, two events with spacelike separation can always be:
choices: connected by a signal travelling at c
made simultaneous by choosing an appropriate inertial frame
assigned the same causal order by all inertial observers
shown to occur at the same spatial location in some frame

questions.q: I have two coins that together make 30 cents. One of them is not a nickel. What are the two coins?
A man walks into a bar and asks for a glass of water. The bartender pulls out a gun and points it at him. The man says 'Thank you' and leaves. Why?
choices: The gun was a water pistol

questions.q: Count the letter F in: 'FINISHED FILES ARE THE RESULT OF YEARS OF SCIENTIFIC STUDY COMBINED WITH THE EXPERIENCE OF MANY YEARS'
A drawer has 10 red socks and 10 blue socks. Picking in the dark, how many socks must you grab to guarantee a matching pair?

Before Mount Everest was discovered, what was the tallest mountain on Earth?
choices: Mount Everest — it was always the tallest
